untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time earnings announcement detection and earnings surprise magnitude in standard deviations from consensus. These are external event data and fundamental metrics not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list (which contains only price-action, volume, and technical indicators). The core logic of detecting post-earnings delayed price trends cannot be fully expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators without access to earnings calendar data and consensus estimates.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price direction and volume confirmation as proxies for post-announcement directional conviction, but this misses the critical earnings surprise magnitude threshold (2.0 stddev) and event timing (within 1 bar of announcement). A production implementation would require integration with an earnings data feed and consensus estimate provider external to the standard technical indicator set.
